name: orbit-desktop
description: Local-first AI operating layer for desktop work
author: Nikhil Kumar Thanda

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch" "wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/main/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.dist:mac: npm run check && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.test: node --test tests/*.test.mjs && python3 -m unittest discover -s sidecar -p 'test_*.py'
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --noEmit && npm test && npm run build

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Orbit listens for the Hey Orbit wake phrase and voice commands while voice mode is enabled.
extendInfo.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Orbit transcribes approved voice commands into local desktop actions.
